name: AMS #2
description: Combined AMS #2 card (H2D only): chamber temp + humidity + drying status + 4 tray rows. Same layout as the primary `ams` widget but reads `ams.ams[0]` (firmware id=0, which is the user-facing 'AMS #2' on H2D — Bambu's MQTT enumeration is reversed from the labeled hardware).
